title: SP Checklist
heading: Survey Programming (SP) QA Checklist
description: Select an exercise type below to view its specific QA rules.

categories.title: Basics & Logic
items: Sections: Verify all sections are present (Screener, Main, Demographics, etc.).
Terminations: Check that all screener terminations work properly.
Qualifications: Check that any DVs holding qualifications punch correctly.
Logic: Check all skip/filter logic at the question or section level.
Quotas: Verify all quotas are built, punching correctly, and check Most Need/Least Filled.
Look and Feel: Graphics look good, no HTML visible, grids/tables correct.

categories.title: Closed & Open Ended
items: Closed-Ended: Check single vs. multi-punch and randomization/default of response lists.
Closed-Ended: Verify 'other' stubs are anchored with a text-entry pop-up.
Open-Ended: Check 'other specify' usage, numerical ranges, and error messages for character limits.
Open-Ended: Check that sums of parts or shares between two questions add up correctly.

categories.title: IIM & PBS
items: Check for logical mapping between items.
Flag if all items are matched to a single category incorrectly.

categories.title: DCM / Conjoint
items: Ensure the respondent didn't straight-line their choices.
Verify that dominant concepts were selected appropriately.

categories.title: Media & Translation
items: Media: Correct clips/images showing up, verify quality, ensure audio can be heard.
Translations: No English in question text, instructions, stubs, or errors. Verify no formatting is broken.
